title: PMM 3.x API path + Settings UI for PMM token/TLS (two bugs from v0.4.4 Rocky 234 deploy)
originDiscussion: v0.4.4 deploy to Rocky 234 — operator reported (1) /settings has no UI for PMM API token / TLS skip flag, .env is the only path; (2) after adding MONITORING_PMM_API_TOKEN to .env and restarting, the external panel banner still shows 'PMM 無法連線'.

rootCause.bug1_no_ui: MonitoringController only exposed PUT /pmm/config (url). settings keys monitoring.pmm_api_token + monitoring.pmm_tls_skip_verify were only writable via DB direct or .env / env var.
rootCause.bug2_404: Rocky 234 runs PMM 3.5.0. PmmInventoryClient was written against PMM 2.x API (POST /v1/inventory/Services/List with body {}). PMM 3 renamed it to GET /v1/inventory/services. Mapping: PMM returned 404 → my client mapped any non-2xx + non-401/403 to 'unreachable' → operator-visible 'PMM 無法連線' banner.

scope.backend: Extend MonitoringService with getCredentialsView() + setCredentials(); add GET/PUT /monitoring/pmm/credentials. Observer pattern for cache invalidation (MonitoringService.onCredentialsChange) — avoids MonitoringModule → DatabasesModule circular import that direct service injection would create. DbMetricsService + ExternalPmmService subscribe at onModuleInit.
scope.pmmInventoryClient: GET /v1/inventory/services (PMM 3.x). Response shape is identical to PMM 2.x (per-engine bucketed object); only path + method + body change.
scope.frontend: Settings page external_monitoring section gains: PMM API token input (write-only, mirrors Cloudflare token UX), TLS verify select (default / skip / enforce). usePmmCredentials + useSetPmmCredentials hooks.

verifiedAgainstRealPmm: Probed live PMM 3.5.0 at https://192.168.199.234:18443 — GET /v1/inventory/services with operator-supplied glsa_... token returned valid {mysql: [...]} response with 'mike-mariadb' and 'mariadb-234' services. Token was rotated by operator post-experiment.

verification.test: pass (250+ tests, existing test ctor signatures updated for new MonitoringService dependency)

deferred: PMM 2.x backward compat — supporting both via /v1/server/version probe + path branching is feasible but PMM 3 GA was Q1 2025; tail of operators on PMM 2 is shrinking. Re-evaluate if a real operator surfaces a 2.x deployment.
